src: ✨ A meticulously crafted macOS development environment featuring a modern, efficient, and aesthetically pleasing setup. Includes configurations for Neovim, Zsh, Tmux, Ghostty/Kitty, and more, all managed through GNU Stow for seamless dotfile management.
ja: Neovim・Zsh・Tmux・Ghostty/Kittyなどの設定を含み、GNU Stowでdotfileを一元管理するモダンで効率的かつ美しいmacOS開発環境
